title: Revenue Calculator
subtitle: Project your revenue over 6 to 24 months based on your release and growth scenarios.

params.title: Parameters
params.subtitle: Adjust the assumptions, the projection updates live
params.growthHint: Monthly growth points added to or removed from the current pace

kpis.rangeHint: Based on the low / high band

chart.title: History & projection
chart.subtitle: 24 months of actuals, median projection and confidence band

donut.title: Projected split by source
donut.subtitle: Last 12 months proportions applied to the projected total

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.intro: A transparent projection, not a crystal ball:
methodology.point1: Starting level: average of the last 3 months of actual revenue.
methodology.point2: Growth: the artist's current monthly pace, adjusted by your release scenario and slider.
methodology.point3: Seasonality: monthly coefficients learned from 24 months of history.
methodology.point4: Uncertainty: the confidence band widens from ±12% short-term up to ±{maxSpread}% at the chosen horizon.
methodology.disclaimer: Indicative projection based on past trends — it is not a revenue guarantee.
